description_long: This is a large, upscale suburban house surrounded by a manicured yard and enclosed by a decorative fence. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a small porch, flanked by symmetrical landscaping and a double garage. The house has multiple gabled and hipped roof sections, with a mix of brick and light-colored siding. The rear of the property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, a round hot tub, and a patio area with outdoor furniture. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes on the rear and smaller, more traditional windows on the front. The property is bordered by hedges, flower beds, and a paved driveway leading to the garage.
description: A large, modern suburban house with a gabled roof, double garage, landscaped yard, and backyard pool. The exterior features brick and light siding, with both traditional and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, symmetrical landscaping, and decorative fencing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the transition from the front yard to the backyard, with visible rooflines and part of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large windows, swimming pool, hot tub, patio furniture, and fenced perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard amenities, side windows, and landscaping along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, large picture windows on rear, mixed sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, flanking columns, and decorative landscaping
